title: Create: Continuum (Vanilla Backport Integration)
description: Adds new recipes to bridge the gap between Create and Vanilla Backport
body:
This mod bridges the gap between Create and Vanilla Backport by adding new recipes using the backported vanilla features that fit the create mod.

Blocks such as Pale Oak Windows and Sulfur/Cinnabar Blocksets are planned for the future!



Thank you for checking out my mod!
- Blouish
